message:
connectors: add Copilot CLI connector module

Register the new copilot_cli connector module in the connectors mod.rs
and add the copilot_cli.rs source file that re-exports the
CopilotCliConnector from franken_agent_detection. This enables
coding_agent_session_search to discover and index GitHub Copilot CLI
(`gh copilot`) event logs alongside the existing Copilot IDE connector,
providing visibility into command-line copilot usage sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+//! Connector for GitHub Copilot CLI (`gh copilot`) event logs.
+//!
+//! Implementation lives in `franken_agent_detection::connectors::copilot_cli`.
+
+pub use franken_agent_detection::CopilotCliConnector;
